evals.name: topic-queries
evals.prompt: pesquisa profunda sobre beta-bloqueadores na prevencao primaria de sangramento varicoso --queries "SCite: PREDESCI nonselective beta-blockers, Consensus: beta-blockers portal hypertension"
evals.expected_output: Research report with narrative synthesis, findings from 3 legs, comparative table, convergence/divergence analysis.

assertions.text: Report opens with a prose narrative summary (5-10 lines) that a professor can read in 60 seconds to understand the evidence landscape
Report contains at least 1 specific actionable recommendation for what to change or keep in teaching material
Report contains findings from at least 2 distinct search legs
Report includes a comparative table with an 'implication' column explaining what each finding means
Report interprets convergences in prose (not just '3/3 = ALTA') explaining WHY convergence matters
Report contains at least 3 PMIDs or DOIs with verification status
Report includes concrete effect sizes with confidence intervals
Report does NOT contain vague claims without specific citation

evals.name: slide-clinical
evals.prompt: avaliar profundidade do slide s-aplicacao na aula metanalise
evals.expected_output: Full pipeline with MBE depth rubric on clinical data (HR, CI, GRADE assessment). Narrative feedback. Reference check. Pedagogical positioning.

assertions.text: Report opens with 3-5 sentences of prose feedback for the professor, not a table or checklist
Report includes depth rubric with 8 dimensions, numeric scores, AND an implication column explaining what each score means for the slide
Report applies GRADE assessment to at least 1 clinical claim with specific reasoning (not N/A)
Report analyzes the slide's position in the narrative arc (what comes before/after, tension, bridge)
Report cross-references evidence-db against slide HTML with consistency checks
Report suggests specific changes in prose (not just 'add X') explaining WHY the change matters
Report includes synthesis across legs with interpreted convergences

evals.name: fast-path-pmid
evals.prompt: verificar PMID 30910320 para confirmar os dados do PREDESCI
evals.expected_output: Fast path: PubMed MCP lookup, formatted citation. No pipeline dispatch.

assertions.text: Report contains PMID 30910320
Report includes at least one author name from the paper
Report describes the study design
Report includes sample size (n)
Report is concise (<80 lines), does NOT contain multi-leg comparative table
Report includes primary endpoint result with effect size
